description:
A business jet manufacturer is exploring a tri-jet variant. Add a center engine S-duct to the baseline fuselage model.

1. Read the specification file on your Desktop at ~/Desktop/s_duct_spec.txt.
2. In OpenVSP, the bizjet_baseline.vsp3 file is already loaded. Add a new 'Duct' component to the model.
3. Rename the component to 'Center_S_Duct'.
4. Position the duct at global X=16.0 m, Z=1.0 m (in the Design/Location tab).
5. Set the duct's overall Length to 4.5 m.
6. Edit the duct's Cross Sections (XSec tab) to create an S-curve. Set the Inlet (first section) Z_Offset to 1.2 m, and the Exit (last section) Z_Offset to -0.2 m.
7. Save the modified model as ~/Documents/OpenVSP/bizjet_trijet.vsp3.
